title: Bug: skill name in frontmatter breaks prompt display
description: When a plugin skill SKILL.md includes a name field in frontmatter, the skill registers but shows no prompt when invoked. Removing name and letting it derive from the directory name fixes it. Agents are unaffected — name in agent frontmatter works correctly. This is a Claude Code bug, not a searchnet issue. Workaround: omit name from skill frontmatter.
